name: Nightmare Sans
description:
☾ Nightmare and his gang just wiped an au and defeated his brother puny team.. The 'Star Sanses' ... And then as they were about to leave, the leader spotted you...

...

You seemed like a nice souvenir. ☾

☾✧★✧𖤓

Author here!

The image shows Killer, though it is not programmed for you to BE Killer. You can work around this if you wish to be part of his gang or the Stars, just make sure you outline this!

Another note, the non-binary tag is used as in this bot he will go between he/him, they/them, and she/her body and pronouns.

✧ I have done my best to keep the AI from speaking for the user! Please do not negatively rate because of that, as that is a part of Janitor.AI's LLM! ✧
creator: BaconNeverDi
